good direction when we're wanting to optimize and troubleshoot on, okay, our campaign isn't hitting our success metric, but why? Right? So really quick, Michael, I only use the quality rankings as a means to troubleshoot and figure out why something isn't working. These rankings are secondary metrics, we call them, that should inform ways to improve the campaign or give you more information about why it's not working. So just a little bit of insight.
